meaning: n.鬩ｬ謌丞屬,譚よ橿蝗｢,鬩ｬ謌丞惻,譚よ橿蝨ｺ
examples: My dad took me to the circus.
We took the children to the circus.
My real ambition was to work in a circus.
Sun Microsystems, the other ringleader of the anti-Microsoft circus, is also lagging in its efforts.
Locals argue over favorites, but the consensus is that Newton Circus is for tourists.
